summary: Tested product cover image feature in accordion expand panel on /compliance-library. All checks passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cover image feature in accordion expand panel is fully working. Image appears at 72x96px on left, bullet list on right, gold border confirmed. Works on both desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px).

test_results.cover_image_displays_on_expand: PASS - 72x96px img renders on left of bullet list
test_results.mobile_375px: PASS - image shows at 72x96 without overflow (x=67.75)
test_results.hide_toggle_text: PASS - switches to HIDE CONTENTS ▲ when expanded
